arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy knows where Leicester City problem lies over Jamie Vardy goal struggles
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy retains total faith in striker Jamie Vardy with the Leicester City captain to continue leading the line. “We have to make sure we keep creating chances for our attacking players,” van Nistelrooy said.

arts.ttl: Arsenal stance on Raheem Sterling has emerged after disastrous season for Gunners
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling joined Arsenal from Chelsea on loan in the summer last year. The former Manchester City man, who has the experience of winning the Premier League with Pep Guardiola’s team, was expected to offer experience, depth and quality to Mikel Arteta’s side. Exclusive: Chelsea identify 11-goal striker as their attacking signing for summer
arts.sum: Signing an attacker would be a priority at Chelsea in the summer considering how much they have struggled in front of goals this season. They failed to sign their top target Victor Osimhen in the summer last year but this time they want to make sure that they add depth and quality to their attack. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Leicester City Premier League clash predicted as Cole Palmer stars
arts.sum: After losing three games in a row in February, Chelsea will be looking to make it three wins on the bounce when they take on Leicester City in the Premier League later today. After beating bottom-of-the-league Southampton 4-0 in their last Premier League outing, the Blues take on 19th-placed Leicester City later today.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea host Leicester City in the Premier League this afternoon aiming to reclaim their place in the top four. Enzo Maresca’s side will move above Manchester City and into fourth if they avoid defeat to the struggling Foxes, following defeat for the Premier League champions at Nottingham Forest. 🧠 pic.twitter.com/nxwVYI8J4H — Chelsea FC (@ChelseaFC) March […] The post Chelsea vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to record consecutive league wins for the first time this calendar year by overcoming Leicester City this afternoon. arts.ttl: Leicester City transfer latest: Who could leave in summer window as club faces relegation from Premier League?
arts.sum: Leicester City face the prospect of relegation from the Premier League and could lose a number of key players in the summer transfer window.
